message:
feat(parallel-parser): add deterministic failover trigger taxonomy and serial fallback decision logging

Introduce FailoverTriggerClass enum (Timeout, TranscriptDivergence,
WitnessMismatch, SafetyPolicyViolation, ParityMismatch, ResourceLimit)
as a stable taxonomy for classifying serial fallback causes.

Add FailoverState transition path, FailoverDecision audit artifact with
trigger, witness IDs, and replay command. The parallel parser now emits
a FailoverDecision at every serial fallback site (transcript divergence,
merge buffer exceeded, parity mismatch). Transcript divergence is now
a graceful fallback instead of a hard error.

All decisions propagate through ParseOutput, ReplayEnvelope, and
structured log entries. Integration tests cover serde roundtrips,
Display impls, replay envelope projection, and failover decision content.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
